import asyncio
import sys
from pathlib import Path

# Add the src directory to the path
src_path = Path(__file__).parent / ''src'' if ''__file__'' in locals() else Path(''./src'')
sys.path.insert(0, str(src_path.resolve()))

from supsrc.config.loader import load_config
from supsrc.runtime.orchestrator import Orchestrator

async def test_monitoring():
    config = load_config(''/Users/tim/code/gh/provide-io/supsrc/examples/supsrc_test.conf'')
    orchestrator = Orchestrator(config)
    
    # Initialize orchestrator
    await orchestrator.initialize()
    
    # Print current monitoring status
    print(f''Monitoring service running: {orchestrator.monitoring_service.is_running}'')
    print(f''Number of handlers: {len(orchestrator.monitoring_service._handlers)}'')
    print(f''Repositories being monitored:'')
    for repo_id in orchestrator.monitoring_service._handlers:
        print(f''  - {repo_id}'')
    
    # Wait for any initial events
    await asyncio.sleep(2)
    print(f''Initial events in queue: {orchestrator.event_queue.qsize()}'')
    
    # Try to create a test file in one of the monitored repos
    test_file = Path(''/tmp/supsrc-example-repo1/monitoring_test.txt'')
    print(f''Creating test file: {test_file}'')
    test_file.write_text(''Test file for monitoring'')
    
    # Wait for event to be detected
    await asyncio.sleep(2)
    print(f''Events in queue after file creation: {orchestrator.event_queue.qsize()}'')
    
    # Process any events
    while not orchestrator.event_queue.empty():
        event = await orchestrator.event_queue.get()
        print(f''Event: {event.event_type} - {event.src_path}'')
    
    await orchestrator.shutdown()

asyncio.run(test_monitoring())
")
